---
title: "Frameworks Multi-Agents"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# Frameworks Multi-Agents

## LangGraph (LangChain)

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/langchain-ai/langgraph` |
| Licence | MIT |
| Stars | 10K+ |
| Paradigme | Directed graphs (state machine) |

**Features** : Stateful agents, cycles, human-in-the-loop, streaming, checkpointing, sub-graphs, parallel execution.

```python
from langgraph.graph import StateGraph, END

graph = StateGraph(AgentState)
graph.add_node("planner", plan_step)
graph.add_node("executor", execute_step)
graph.add_node("reviewer", review_step)

graph.add_edge("planner", "executor")
graph.add_conditional_edges("executor", should_review, {
    True: "reviewer", False: END
})
graph.add_conditional_edges("reviewer", is_good, {
    True: END, False: "planner"
})
```

## CrewAI

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/crewAIInc/crewAI` |
| Licence | MIT |
| Stars | 25K+ |
| Paradigme | Role-based crews |

**Features** : Role-based agents (researcher, writer, reviewer), tasks, processes (sequential, hierarchical), tools, memory.

```python
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew

researcher = Agent(
    role="Researcher",
    goal="Find information",
    backstory="Expert researcher",
    tools=[search_tool]
)

writer = Agent(
    role="Writer",
    goal="Write a report",
    backstory="Technical writer"
)

crew = Crew(
    agents=[researcher, writer],
    tasks=[research_task, write_task],
    process=Process.sequential
)
```

## AutoGen (Microsoft)

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/microsoft/autogen` |
| Licence | MIT |
| Stars | 35K+ |
| Paradigme | Conversational multi-agent |

**Features** : Conversational agents, GroupChat, code execution, human proxy, nested chats.

## OpenAI Swarm

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/openai/swarm` |
| Licence | MIT |
| Paradigme | Lightweight handoff |

**Features** : Ultra-léger, routing via handoffs, pas de state management, educational framework.

## Comparatif

| Framework | Paradigme | Stateful | Streaming | Human-in-loop | Complexité | Production |
|-----------|-----------|----------|-----------|---------------|------------|------------|
| LangGraph | Graph | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | Moyenne | ✅ |
| CrewAI | Roles | ✅ | ⚠️ | ✅ | Faible | ✅ |
| AutoGen | Conversation | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | Moyenne | ✅ |
| Swarm | Handoff | ❌ | ❌ | ❌ | Très faible | ❌ (educational) |

::: callout-tip
## Choix framework
- **LangGraph** — Best pour workflows complexes avec cycles et conditions
- **CrewAI** — Best pour teams d'agents avec rôles définis (simple, rapide)
- **AutoGen** — Best pour conversations multi-agent avec code execution
- **Swarm** — Best pour apprendre les concepts (pas production)
:::

## Frameworks découverts automatiquement

<!-- TOOLS_FRAMEWORK_START -->
### [OpenClaw](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw)
Open-source AI agent framework that turns LLMs into persistent, proactive personal AI agents with multi-channel messaging (Signal, Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp), cron scheduling, memory systems, MCP...

⭐ 382.8k | `TypeScript` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-13
**Tags** : `ai`, `assistant`, `crustacean`, `molty`, `openclaw`, `own-your-data`, `personal`

### [Hermes Agent](https://github.com/nousresearch/hermes-agent)
The agent that grows with you

⭐ 214.0k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-13
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-agent`, `ai-agents`, `anthropic`, `chatgpt`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `clawdbot`

### [OpenCode](https://github.com/sst/opencode)
The AI coding agent built for the terminal. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 185.2k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-13

### [Paperclip](https://github.com/paperclipai/paperclip)
Open-source platform to run coding agents as managed workers with tasks, approvals, budgets, and workspaces. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 73.5k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-13

### [MetaGPT](https://github.com/geekan/MetaGPT)
🌟 The Multi-Agent Framework: First AI Software Company, Towards Natural Language Programming

⭐ 69.3k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-13
**Tags** : `agent`, `gpt`, `llm`, `metagpt`, `multi-agent`

### [Cline](https://github.com/cline/cline)
Open-source AI coding agent giving developers direct access to frontier models with full transparency. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 64.6k | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-13

### [open-interpreter](https://github.com/KillianLucas/open-interpreter)
A lightweight coding agent for open models like Deepseek, Kimi, and Qwen

⭐ 64.4k | `Rust` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-13
**Tags** : `coding-agent`, `deepseek`, `interpreter`, `kimi`, `qwen`, `rust`, `tui`

### [Autogen](https://github.com/microsoft/autogen)
Enable Next-Gen Large Language Model Applications. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 59.7k | `Python` | Licence: CC-BY-4.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-13
**Tags** : `agentic`, `agentic-agi`, `agents`, `ai`, `autogen`, `autogen-ecosystem`, `chatgpt`, `framework`

### [crewai](https://github.com/joaomdmoura/crewai)
Framework for orchestrating role-playing, autonomous AI agents. By fostering collaborative intelligence, CrewAI empowers agents to work together seamlessly, tackling complex tasks.

⭐ 55.4k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-13
**Tags** : `agents`, `ai`, `ai-agents`, `aiagentframework`, `llms`

### [Aider](https://github.com/Aider-AI/aider)
aider is AI pair programming in your terminal !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 47.3k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-13
**Tags** : `anthropic`, `chatgpt`, `claude-3`, `cli`, `command-line`, `gemini`, `gpt-3`, `gpt-35-turbo`

### [nanobot](https://github.com/HKUDS/nanobot)
Ultra-lightweight personal AI assistant framework (~4,000 lines of Python). Supports MCP, 9+ chat channels, and extensible skills system. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 45.3k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-13
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-agent`, `ai-agents`, `anthropic`, `chatgpt`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `codex`

### [Phidata](https://github.com/phidatahq/phidata)
Build AI Assistants with memory, knowledge and tools. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 41.1k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-13
**Tags** : `agents`, `ai`, `ai-agents`, `developer-tools`, `python`

### [DSPy](https://github.com/stanfordnlp/dspy)
The framework for programming—not prompting—foundation models !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 36.1k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-13

### [continue](https://github.com/continuedev/continue)
open-source coding agent

⭐ 34.8k | `TypeScript` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-13
**Tags** : `agent`, `ai`, `cli`, `developer-tools`, `open-source`

### [ChatDev](https://github.com/OpenBMB/ChatDev)
ChatDev 2.0: Dev All through LLM-powered Multi-Agent Collaboration

⭐ 33.7k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-13

### [GitHub (Issue Only)](https://github.com/getcursor/cursor)

⭐ 33.0k | MAJ: 2026-07-13

### [Storm](https://github.com/stanford-oval/storm)
An LLM-powered knowledge curation system that researches a topic and generates a full-length report with citations. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 30.0k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-13
**Tags** : `agentic-rag`, `deep-research`, `emnlp2024`, `knowledge-curation`, `large-language-models`, `naacl`, `nlp`, `report-generation`

### [smolagents](https://github.com/huggingface/smolagents)
Open-source Python library designed to make it extremely easy to build and run agents using just a few lines of code. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 28.3k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-13

### [AgentScope](https://github.com/modelscope/agentscope)
Start building LLM-empowered multi-agent applications in an easier way. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 27.8k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-13
**Tags** : `agent`, `chatbot`, `large-language-models`, `llm`, `llm-agent`, `mcp`, `multi-agent`, `multi-modal`

### [localGPT](https://github.com/PromtEngineer/localGPT)
Chat with your documents on your local device using GPT models. No data leaves your device and 100% private.

⭐ 22.2k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-12

### [Swarm](https://github.com/openai/swarm)
Educational framework exploring ergonomic, lightweight multi-agent orchestration by OpenAI. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 21.8k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-13

### [devika](https://github.com/stitionai/devika)
Devika is the first open-source implementation of an Agentic Software Engineer. Initially started as an open-source alternative to Devin.

⭐ 19.5k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-13

### [Hindsight](https://github.com/vectorize-io/hindsight)
State-of-the-art long-term memory for AI agents by Vectorize. Open source, self-hostable, with integrations for LangChain, CrewAI, LlamaIndex, Vercel AI SDK, MCP, and more. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 18.3k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-13
**Tags** : `agentic-ai`, `agents`, `ai-memory`, `memory`

### [camel](https://github.com/camel-ai/camel)
🐫 CAMEL: The first and the best multi-agent framework. Finding the Scaling Law of Agents. https://www.camel-ai.org

⭐ 17.4k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-13
**Tags** : `agent`, `ai-societies`, `artificial-intelligence`, `communicative-ai`, `cooperative-ai`, `deep-learning`, `large-language-models`, `multi-agent-systems`

### [AI Scientist](https://github.com/SakanaAI/AI-Scientist)
The AI Scientist: Towards Fully Automated Open-Ended Scientific !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 14.2k | `Jupyter Notebook` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-13

### [Pipecat](https://github.com/pipecat-ai/pipecat)
Open Source framework for voice and multimodal conversational AI. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 13.4k | `Python` | Licence: BSD-2-Clause | MAJ: 2026-07-13
**Tags** : `ai`, `chatbot-framework`, `chatbots`, `real-time`, `voice`, `voice-assistant`

### [e2b](https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b)
Open-source platform for building & deploying virtual developers’ agents

⭐ 13.0k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-13
**Tags** : `agent`, `ai`, `ai-agent`, `ai-agents`, `code-interpreter`, `copilot`, `development`, `devtools`

### [Claude Engineer](https://github.com/Doriandarko/claude-engineer)
Claude Engineer is an interactive command-line interface (CLI) that leverages the power of Anthropic's Claude-3.5-Sonnet model to assist with software development tasks.

⭐ 11.2k | `Python` | MAJ: 2026-07-12

### [Hive](https://github.com/aden-hive/hive)
Open-source AI agent framework for building goal-driven, self-improving autonomous agents. Define outcomes in natural language and auto-generate agent graphs with built-in evolution loops, MCP inte...

⭐ 10.7k | `Python` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-13
**Tags** : `agent`, `agent-framework`, `agent-skills`, `anthropic`, `automation`, `autonomous-agents`, `claude`, `harness`

### [Arize-Phoenix](https://github.com/Arize-ai/phoenix)
Arize-Phoenix is an open source library for agent testing, evaluation and observability. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 10.5k | `Python` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-13
**Tags** : `agents`, `ai-monitoring`, `ai-observability`, `aiengineering`, `anthropic`, `datasets`, `evals`, `langchain`

<!-- TOOLS_FRAMEWORK_END -->
